title: Immersive Interfaces - Spell Engine (RPG Series)
description: This texture pack adds special compatibility with Spell Engine, integrating its grooves into the aesthetics of Immersive Interfaces.
body: **Bundle Texture Pack Compat** [**Immersive Interfaces - Mod Support Unofficial**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/immersive-interfaces-mod-support-unofficial) ### Immersive Interfaces - Mod Support Unofficial This texture pack adds special compatibility with Spell Engine (RPG Series), integrating its grooves into the aesthetics of Immersive Interfaces. ### Before: ![g](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6023a26af1bab7945d189ebd8cffa5ea76245702.png) ### After: ![s](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8474fac760eeba4bf83765949f8851080d2bb8f.png)
